scripts.prep:shared: npm --prefix sharedcode install && npm --prefix sharedcode run build && (cd sharedcode && npm pack)
scripts.prep:survey: npm --prefix survey install && npm --prefix survey run build && (cd survey && npm pack)
scripts.prep:emailSurveyLambda: cp survey/learning-play-audit-survey-0.10.0.tgz cdk-stacks/resources/emailSurveyLambda/survey/learning-play-audit-survey-0.10.0.tgz && npm --prefix cdk-stacks/resources/emailSurveyLambda install && npm --prefix cdk-stacks/resources/emailSurveyLambda run build
scripts.build:test: npm run clean && npm run prep:shared && npm run prep:survey && npm run prep:emailSurveyLambda && npm --prefix adminclient run build:test && npm --prefix surveyclient run build:test
scripts.build:live: npm run clean && npm run prep:shared && npm run prep:survey && npm run prep:emailSurveyLambda && npm --prefix adminclient run build:live && npm --prefix surveyclient run build:live
